name: Modification of Assumed-Immutable Data (MAID)
description: The product does not adequately protect data that is assumed to be immutable from unauthorized modification. This commonly affects environment variables, web parameters, cookies, and hidden form fields that developers incorrectly treat as tamper-proof.
detection_pattern: A STORAGE node holding data assumed to be immutable (configuration, environment variables, hidden fields) is reachable from an INGRESS node carrying externally-controlled input without an AUTH[integrity_check] or CONTROL[immutability_enforcement] mediator preventing modification.
